caption: cyRespond to a property possession claim
heading: cyInstalments
paragraph1: cyA decision about the instalments you can afford to pay will be made at the hearing. You’ll be able to tell the judge if your circumstances have changed between now and the hearing.
amountQuestion: cyHow much could you afford to pay in addition to the current rent?
frequencyQuestion: cyHow frequently could you afford to pay this amount?

errors.instalmentAmount: cyEnter how much you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent
errors.instalmentAmountFormat: cyEnter the amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent in the correct format
errors.instalmentAmountMax: cyThe amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent must be less than £1 billion
errors.instalmentAmountMin: cyThe amount you could afford to pay in addition to the current rent must be £0.00 or above
errors.instalmentFrequency: cySelect how frequently you could afford to pay this amount
